description: Returns a list of Lambda functions, with the version-specific configuration of each.

unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.reason: Listing Lambda functions reveals serverless compute resources, their runtimes, and configurations, aiding in cloud infrastructure discovery.
Lambda function configurations can include IAM role ARNs, revealing information about accounts and roles used across the environment.

securityImplications: Attackers might use ListFunctions to enumerate Lambda functions, identifying targets that may contain hardcoded secrets or have overly permissive IAM roles attached.
